title: gentiana aurea var. umbellata
intro: Gentiana aurea var. umbellata, also known as the golden gentian, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the gentian plant, characterized by its unique umbrella-shaped inflorescence and yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentiana aurea var. umbellata are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
